title: Junior Revenue Manager at Scootsy Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Scootsy Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Scootsy Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Scootsy Holdings Services:
Scootsy Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy Holdings Services!
